body:
Based on the available search results, it is not possible to confirm if "Valiant Garage Door" installs Wi-Fi-enabled garage door openers. The search results provide information about other companies (such as Precision Door, _Mile High Garage Door Specialists_ , and OK Discount Garage Door) that offer Wi-Fi-enabled opener installation services. [Wi-Fi Garage Door Openers](https://www.precisiondoor.net/garage-door-openers/wi-fi-enabled-openers)[Upgrade Your Home with WiFi Garage Door Automation](https://milehighgaragedoorspecialists.com/services/wifi-and-automation/)[Garage Door Opener Installation & Repair | Same Day Service](https://okdiscountgaragedoor.com/garage-door-openers)[Wi-Fi-Enabled Garage Door Openers | Precision Garage Door Service](https://precisiongaragedoor.ca/services/garage-door-openers/wi-fi-enabled-openers)

I recommend checking the specific company's website or contacting them directly to confirm their services.

If you are looking for **smart garage door opener installation** , I can help you:

  * Find top-rated local installers.
  * Compare features of popular smart openers (e.g., Chamberlain, Genie).
  * Provide a checklist of features to look for (app control, camera, battery backup).

Let me know if you would like me to look up information on a different company!
